child-plan.critical-rules: - CLAUDE.md Rule #16: NO regex. Use str.partition() for metric key manipulation, ast.parse() for Python source guards, yaml.safe_load() for YAML parsing. - CLAUDE.md Rule #3: Library-First. monai.inferers.sliding_window_inference is the ONLY allowed sliding-window inference path for ALL models. NO custom inference loops. - CLAUDE.md Rule #9: Task-Agnostic. NO if model_family == "sam3" branches in analysis_flow.py. All model-specific logic goes in adapter methods (get_eval_roi_size). - CLAUDE.md Rule #2: TDD mandatory. Failing test FIRST, then minimum implementation. - MONAI-First vision: This fix enforces identical MONAI sliding_window_inference parameters across ALL models. This is the scientific integrity requirement for paper tables. - Do NOT touch train_flow.py or trainer.py — training-time fast validation is intentionally model-specific and must NOT be changed. - The hardcoded roi_size=(32,32,32) in analysis_flow.py is the bug. An AST guard test (Task T-ME.5.3) will permanently prevent this literal from returning.

phase.name: Pydantic schema — InferenceStrategyConfig
phase.description: Add InferenceStrategyConfig Pydantic model and inference_strategies list to EvaluationConfig. Validation: exactly one strategy with is_primary=True; unique names; roi_size constraints.

task.name: RED — test_inference_strategy_config.py
task.test-first: - test_strategy_config_constructed_from_dict: basic happy path - test_roi_size_per_model_string_accepted: roi_size="per_model" is valid - test_roi_size_list_of_ints_accepted: roi_size=[128, 128, 16] is valid - test_roi_size_wildcard_depth_accepted: roi_size=[512, 512, -1] is valid - test_overlap_must_be_less_than_one: overlap=1.0 raises ValidationError - test_sw_batch_size_must_be_positive: sw_batch_size=0 raises ValidationError - test_evaluation_config_requires_exactly_one_primary: two is_primary=True raises - test_evaluation_config_no_primary_raises: zero is_primary=True raises - test_evaluation_config_unique_names_enforced: duplicate name raises - test_evaluation_config_empty_strategies_allowed: [] is valid (no evaluation run)

task.name: GREEN — evaluation_config.py
task.description: Add InferenceStrategyConfig (Pydantic BaseModel) and extend EvaluationConfig with inference_strategies: list[InferenceStrategyConfig] field. Use @model_validator for primary-strategy uniqueness. Default value: one standard_patch strategy (is_primary=True) so existing code that doesn't pass inference_strategies still works.
task.content-guidance:
from __future__ import annotations from typing import Literal from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, model_validator
class InferenceStrategyConfig(BaseModel): name: str description: str = "" roi_size: list[int] | Literal["per_model"] overlap: float = Field(default=0.5, ge=0.0, lt=1.0) sw_batch_size: int = Field(default=4, ge=1) aggregation_mode: Literal["gaussian", "constant"] = "gaussian" is_primary: bool = False
Add to EvaluationConfig: inference_strategies: list[InferenceStrategyConfig] = Field(default_factory=lambda: [ InferenceStrategyConfig( name="standard_patch", description="Fixed patch for cross-model scientific comparability", roi_size=[128, 128, 16], overlap=0.5, sw_batch_size=4, is_primary=True, ) ])
@model_validator(mode="after") def _validate_strategies(self) -> "EvaluationConfig": if self.inference_strategies: primaries = [s for s in self.inference_strategies if s.is_primary] if len(primaries) != 1: raise ValueError(f"Exactly 1 strategy must have is_primary=True, got {len(primaries)}") names = [s.name for s in self.inference_strategies] if len(names) != len(set(names)): raise ValueError("Inference strategy names must be unique") return self

task.name: Checkpoint phase 1
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/unit/config/test_inference_strategy_config.py -x -q && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.acceptance: All pass. Commit: "feat(#505): InferenceStrategyConfig Pydantic schema for multi-strategy evaluation"

task.name: RED — test_evaluation_yaml_loading.py
task.test-first: - test_default_yaml_loads_without_error: yaml.safe_load(default.yaml) → EvaluationConfig OK - test_default_yaml_has_standard_patch_strategy: exactly one strategy, name="standard_patch" - test_default_yaml_standard_patch_is_primary: standard_patch.is_primary == True - test_default_yaml_roi_size_is_list_of_ints: roi_size == [128, 128, 16] - test_default_yaml_has_fast_strategy: strategy named "fast" with roi_size="per_model" - test_default_yaml_fast_is_not_primary: fast.is_primary == False

task.name: GREEN — configs/evaluation/default.yaml
task.description: Add the inference_strategies block to configs/evaluation/default.yaml with standard_patch (primary) and fast strategies. Do NOT add full_volume to default (requires >= 24 GB VRAM — document it as an optional addition).
task.content-guidance:
inference_strategies: - name: standard_patch description: "Fixed patch across ALL models — use for paper tables" roi_size: [128, 128, 16] overlap: 0.5 sw_batch_size: 4 aggregation_mode: gaussian is_primary: true
- name: fast description: "Per-model-optimal ROI for quick iteration (not in paper tables)" roi_size: per_model overlap: 0.25 sw_batch_size: 4 aggregation_mode: gaussian is_primary: false
# Optional (NOT in default — requires >= 24 GB VRAM for DynUNet): # - name: full_volume # description: "Full HW slice sweep; -1 in depth = use actual volume depth" # roi_size: [512, 512, -1] # overlap: 0.5 # sw_batch_size: 1 # aggregation_mode: gaussian # is_primary: false

task.name: Checkpoint phase 2
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/unit/config/ -x -q && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.acceptance: All pass. Commit: "feat(#505): default.yaml inference_strategies — standard_patch + fast"

task.name: RED — test_eval_roi_size.py
task.test-first: - test_base_class_default_returns_128_128_16: create any mock adapter (minimal concrete subclass of ModelAdapter) and assert get_eval_roi_size() == (128, 128, 16) - test_sam3_vanilla_returns_512_512_3: mock-construct Sam3VanillaAdapter (patch sam3 weights loading to avoid requiring GPU) and assert (512, 512, 3) - test_mamba_uses_base_default: MambaAdapter constructed with mock config → (128, 128, 16) - test_vesselfm_uses_base_default: VesselFMAdapter(config, pretrained=False) → (128, 128, 16) - test_dynunet_uses_base_default: DynUNetAdapter → (128, 128, 16)

task.name: GREEN — base.py + sam3_vanilla.py
task.description: Add get_eval_roi_size() concrete method (not abstract) to ModelAdapter in base.py. Override only in Sam3VanillaAdapter → (512, 512, 3). Rationale for SAM3: ViT-32L resizes all inputs to 1008x1008 regardless of spatial size, so fewer depth slices per window = fewer encoder calls = faster eval. Do NOT override in DynUNet, Mamba, VesselFM — base default (128, 128, 16) is correct.
task.acceptance: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/unit/adapters/test_eval_roi_size.py -x -q passes.

task.name: Checkpoint phase 3
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/unit/adapters/ -x -q && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.acceptance: All pass. Commit: "feat(#505): ModelAdapter.get_eval_roi_size() — SAM3 override to (512,512,3)"

task.name: RED — test_multi_strategy_inference.py
task.test-first: - test_resolve_roi_size_per_model_calls_adapter: mock adapter with get_eval_roi_size() returning (64,64,8); per_model strategy resolves to (64,64,8) - test_resolve_roi_size_literal: strategy with roi_size=[128,128,16] resolves to (128,128,16) regardless of model - test_resolve_roi_size_wildcard_depth: roi_size=[512,512,-1] with volume shape (1,1,64,64,30) resolves to (512,512,30) - test_plain_nn_module_uses_fallback_roi: model without get_eval_roi_size() (plain nn.Module) + per_model strategy → fallback (128,128,16) - test_predictor_handles_segmentation_output: model that returns SegmentationOutput is correctly unwrapped to tensor by _make_predictor() - test_predictor_handles_plain_tensor: model that returns plain tensor works too - test_run_all_strategies_returns_dict_keyed_by_strategy_name: mock sliding_window_inference, 2 strategies → dict with 2 keys matching strategy names

task.name: GREEN — multi_strategy_inference.py
task.description: Implement MultiStrategyInferenceRunner in src/minivess/pipeline/multi_strategy_inference.py. Use monai.inferers.sliding_window_inference as the ONLY inference path (MONAI-first). The _make_predictor() pattern matches trainer.py's _model_fn — copy that pattern exactly. NO regex anywhere. Use hasattr() for SegmentationOutput detection. Key method: _resolve_roi_size(strategy, model, volume_shape) → tuple[int,int,int]. - If roi_size == "per_model": call model.get_eval_roi_size() if exists, else (128,128,16) - If roi_size has -1: replace -1 with volume_shape dimension at that index - Otherwise: return roi_size as tuple

task.name: Checkpoint phase 4
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/unit/pipeline/test_multi_strategy_inference.py -x -q && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.acceptance: All pass. Commit: "feat(#505): MultiStrategyInferenceRunner — MONAI sliding_window for all models"

phase.name: Wire into Analysis Flow + metric logging

task.name: RED — test_analysis_flow_multi_strategy.py
task.test-first: - test_evaluate_single_model_calls_each_strategy: mock sliding_window_inference, assert called once per strategy in config (2 strategies → 2 calls) - test_primary_strategy_results_have_no_prefix: primary strategy metrics returned under bare keys (dsc, cldice), not prefixed - test_non_primary_strategy_results_have_prefix: fast strategy metrics returned as fast/dsc, fast/cldice — use str.partition("/") to split, no regex - test_primary_strategy_tag_logged: MLflow tag "eval_inference_strategy_primary" is set to the primary strategy name

task.name: GREEN — analysis_flow.py: replace hardcoded SlidingWindowInferenceRunner
task.description: In _evaluate_single_model_on_all(): replace the hardcoded SlidingWindowInferenceRunner(roi_size=(32, 32, 32), num_classes=2, overlap=0.25) with MultiStrategyInferenceRunner(strategies=eval_config.inference_strategies). Add inference_strategies parameter to _evaluate_single_model_on_all() signature. Metric key prefixing: use str.partition("/") — NO regex (CLAUDE.md Rule #16).

task.name: Guard tests — AST-based regression prevention
task.description: Write two permanent guard tests that prevent future regressions: 1. AST guard: assert literal (32, 32, 32) as a tuple does NOT appear in analysis_flow.py Use ast.parse() + ast.walk() to find ast.Tuple nodes — no regex. 2. Task-Agnostic guard: assert analysis_flow.py contains no string comparison against model family names ("sam3", "dynunet", "mamba") in if-branch conditions. Use ast.parse() + ast.walk() to find ast.Compare nodes comparing to string literals. These tests run EVERY time and act as a permanent CLAUDE.md Rules #9 + #16 enforcement.

task.name: Checkpoint phase 5
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/unit/orchestration/ -x -q && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.acceptance: All pass. Commit: "fix(#505): analysis_flow — replace hardcoded roi_size with YAML-driven MultiStrategyInferenceRunner"

task.name: Integration smoke — 2 strategies × DynUNet CPU
task.description: Integration test: build DynUNetAdapter (CPU, in-memory), create 2 InferenceStrategyConfig objects (standard_patch + fast), create synthetic volume (1,1,16,64,64), run MultiStrategyInferenceRunner.run_all_strategies(), assert: - Two result dicts returned - fast strategy uses adapter's default roi_size (128,128,16) - standard_patch uses [128,128,16] literal - Both produce output tensors of shape (1,2,16,64,64) Also: verify Mamba adapter produces correct output shape — if it silently transposes dimensions internally, this will catch it.
task.test-first: - test_multi_strategy_dynunet_cpu_smoke - test_multi_strategy_mamba_cpu_smoke: assert output shape (1,2,H,W,D) not (1,2,D,H,W)

task.name: Full verify + PR
task.test-command: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/ -x -q -m "not requires_docker and not slow and not gpu_required" && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports
task.on-failure: Fix any failures. Do NOT dismiss as pre-existing.

task.name: Create PR closing #505
task.description: Push branch and create PR. Title must be clear about scientific importance. If Mamba dimension test (T-ME.6.1) fails, create a SEPARATE issue before creating the PR. Do NOT close #505 if Mamba dimension bug is found — create a follow-up issue.
task.changes: git push -u origin feat/analysis-multi-strategy-eval gh pr create --title "feat(analysis-flow): YAML-driven multi-strategy sliding-window evaluation — scientific fairness (#505)" --body "..."

child-plan.completion-signal: When this plan is complete: - PR created for feat/analysis-multi-strategy-eval closing #505 - All tests passing (or Mamba dimension issue filed separately) - MONAI multi-strategy evaluation enforced in Analysis Flow - Paper tables can now be generated from standardized standard_patch evaluation This is the final plan in the overnight-prefect-docker-monai.sh sequence. DONE.
